header.title: Padmasali Family Network
header.description: Sacred Lineages and Ancestral Gotras of the Padmasali Community.

step0.title: Ancient Roots
step0.subtitle: Welcome to the Padmasali Family Network
step0.content: This interactive map traces the sacred lineages and ancestral Gotras of our community, starting from the Mula Purusha, Bhavana Rishi.

step1.title: Navigating the Lineage
step1.subtitle: How the tree grows
step1.content: Lineages are grouped alphabetically. Click an alphabet to see associated Gotras, then click a Gotra to reveal its Surnames.

step2.title: Advanced Search
step2.subtitle: Find your specific heritage
step2.content: Use the floating search bar at the top right to instantly find specific Gotras or Surnames across the entire network.

step3.title: Interactive Map
step3.subtitle: Explore with ease
step3.content: Use your mouse or touch to pan across the history. Scroll to zoom in on specific details. Double-click the map to reset the view.

step4.title: Begin Your Journey
step4.subtitle: Discover your connections
step4.content: Your ancestral history is now at your fingertips. Start exploring the threads that connect us all.
